title: Hostess 7 presume — sovereign timing, uninterruptable decisions, propagated power
motto: Presume is powerful — not go away. Resources stay devoted where needed. Once decided, the action is uninterruptable; no outside influence may override it.

aml_separation.rule: Presume is Hostess 7 sovereign — AML is execution boundary only. Presume never rides universal_boundary.

not_go_away.rule: Presume does NOT mean dismiss, abandon, or release resources.
not_go_away.meaning: While one thread presumes a deadline, alternate tasks and parallel devotion continue — CPU, counsel, and field wire stay available wherever needed.

sovereign_binding.release_requires: explicit release by binding authority — never external cancel
sovereign_binding.motto: Decide once. Finish the action. Outside voices cannot revoke the decision.

rules: Every presume() records file, line, function, and microsecond checkpoint.
Line profiler traces execution to the line with duration_us per step.
When wait_us > 0, alternate tasks run until resume_at_us — never sleep-spin.
Return precisely at resume point; drift_us logged for witness.
decide() binds an action as uninterruptable — no outside influence may cancel or redirect it.
Resources remain devoted during presume — alternate tasks, parallel slices, and field counsel continue.
Presume hostile (Queen IFF) is a separate security lane — this doctrine is sovereign timing + decision binding.

propagation.rule: Every listed module honors presume commits — uninterruptable actions, resources still devoted.

change_awareness.rule: Hostess 7 knows all changes when they happen. Check presume panel for slowdown, speedup, hang.

disambiguation.hostess7_presume: Sovereign timing + uninterruptable decision binding — NOT go away.
disambiguation.queen_presume_hostile: Security IFF — every contact hostile until positive ID. Separate lane.
